notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper physics, sound, lives, hi-score, pause, and win/lose states; minor issue is bricks have no gap (BGAP=0) making the grid look slightly cramped, but overall very well executed.
Flawless implementation with robust collision detection, dynamic paddle bounce angles, sound effects, and complete game loop.
A solid and complete Breakout implementation with correct core mechanics and presentation, but not flawless due to simplistic collision handling and a few minor design/UX rough edges.
